Brief description.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Improvement / refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the existing patterns in the codebase
- [ ] I've tested this locally with `make up`
- [ ] New API routes have input validation
- [ ] New components are `"use client"` where needed
- [ ] Schema changes include proper indexes and FK cascades

## Screenshots

If UI changes, include before/after screenshots.
